questions.question: Which of the following is an empirical estimation model?
options: A) Three-Point Estimation
B) Program Evaluation and Review Technique (PERT)
C) Critique de Concertation (CC)
D) All of the above
questions.explanation: Critique de Concertation (CC) and Three-Point Estimation are empirical estimation models, while PERT is a probabilistic estimation model.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of the Three-Point Estimation model?
options: A) To provide a single estimate for the entire project
B) To provide a range of possible estimates for the entire project
C) To provide a single estimate for a single task
D) To provide a range of possible estimates for a single task
questions.explanation: The Three-Point Estimation model provides a range of possible estimates for the entire project, including a most likely estimate and a pessimistic estimate.

questions.question: Which of the following is a characteristic of the Program Evaluation and Review Technique (PERT)?
options: A) It uses historical data to estimate project duration
B) It provides a single estimate for the entire project
C) It uses probability distributions to estimate project duration
D) It only estimates task duration, not project duration
questions.explanation: PERT uses probability distributions to estimate project duration, making it a probabilistic estimation model.

questions.question: What is the main advantage of using empirical estimation models?
options: A) They are based on historical data, making them more accurate
B) They are more complex and difficult to use
C) They provide a single estimate for the entire project
D) They are less expensive to implement
questions.explanation: Empirical estimation models are based on historical data, making them more accurate and reliable than other estimation methods.

questions.question: Which of the following is a disadvantage of using empirical estimation models?
options: A) They are based on historical data, making them more accurate
B) They can be influenced by external factors
C) They are more complex and difficult to use
D) They only estimate task duration, not project duration
questions.explanation: Empirical estimation models can be influenced by external factors, such as changes in project scope or team dynamics, which can impact the accuracy of the estimate.
